content.summary: India is a large and growing market with complex regulatory environment. High import tariffs on some goods but significant demand for palm oil, rubber, and specialty commodities. RCEP not signed by India.
content.paymentPreference: L/C recommended; T/T with advance payment for new buyers
bestPractices: FSSAI (Food Safety and Standards Authority of India) registration mandatory for food
BIS certification required for electronics and safety products
High import duties — factor into pricing (15-40% for processed foods)
GSP scheme may provide duty reduction
